description_long: This is a modern sport motorcycle with a sleek, aerodynamic design, featuring a predominantly black body accented with bold orange graphics and orange wheel rims. The motorcycle has a full front fairing with a clear windshield, angular side panels, and a compact, upward-angled tail section. The seat is streamlined and designed for a single rider, with a small pillion area at the rear. The wheels are alloy with a multi-spoke design, and the tires are wide, suitable for high-speed urban or highway riding. The handlebars are low and sporty, and the exhaust system is integrated into the lower side of the bike. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet robust frame, ideal for agile maneuvering in city environments.
description: A black and orange sport motorcycle with a full fairing, aerodynamic bodywork, and orange-accented wheels, designed for speed and agility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars, angular front fairing, and single headlight.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange graphics, alloy wheels, and aerodynamic fairing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, license plate, and rear tire.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust, orange wheel rims, and detailed bodywork.
